reason_for_decision: The article now defines passive detection clearly, separates it from active sensing, and adds enough operational boundary conditions to pass.
strengths: It explains passive sensing as a family rather than one device.
The article now draws a usable line between passive and active detection.
The layered-architecture discussion improves deployment relevance.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is clearer, more bounded, and more useful than the earlier definition-style draft.
